evidence.proof: Only scaffold exists. Real Mac proof was not completed because Rust/Cargo/Tauri CLI and signing identity are missing.
evidence.boundary: Requires this Mac or CI to have Rust >= 1.77.2, Tauri CLI, real product frontend build, Apple Developer ID signing identity, notarization credentials, and installed-app smoke evidence.

evidence.proof: Only scaffold exists. Real Windows proof cannot run from this Mac session because no Windows runner, MSVC Rust toolchain, WebView2 baseline check, Windows SDK/signtool, or Windows signing certificate is available.
evidence.boundary: Requires Windows runner with MSVC Rust toolchain, Tauri CLI, real product frontend build, WebView2 baseline, signtool-capable Windows SDK, code signing certificate, and installed NSIS/MSI smoke evidence.

evidence.proof: Boundary only. macOS has codesign tool but 0 valid identities. No Apple notarization env vars, no Tauri updater private key, and no Windows PFX/password/thumbprint are present.
evidence.boundary: Requires Apple Developer ID/Application credentials, notarization env vars, Windows code signing certificate thumbprint, timestamp authority, Tauri updater signer keys, and secret handling outside repository.

evidence.proof: Only updater scaffold exists. Real updater proof is blocked because Tauri signer key generation cannot run without Tauri CLI, and signed release artifacts/endpoints do not exist.
evidence.boundary: Requires Tauri signer key generation, private key in build environment, signed Mac/Windows update artifacts, release JSON endpoint, channel naming policy, and update install smoke test.

evidence.proof: Only Stronghold scaffold exists. Real secure storage proof is blocked until native app can run and Product decides whether Stronghold is acceptable versus native Keychain/Credential Manager integration.
evidence.boundary: Requires installed-app secret write/read/delete smoke, vault migration policy, and Product decision on Stronghold versus native OS credential storage.

evidence.proof: Only deep-link scaffold exists. Real behavior proof requires installed app dispatch of zhenzhi-ai-native://pair?... on macOS and Windows.
evidence.boundary: Installed app smoke test must verify zhenzhi-ai-native://pair?... dispatch on macOS and Windows.

evidence.proof: Only notification scaffold exists. Real OS permission behavior proof requires installed app prompt and send smoke on macOS and Windows.
evidence.boundary: Windows notification behavior requires installed app; macOS permission prompt requires interactive smoke test.

evidence.proof: Only network boundary notes exist. No enterprise proxy/PAC/TLS interception test was run.
evidence.boundary: Requires approved central API/update domains, proxy/PAC behavior test, TLS interception policy, offline retry UX, and no infinite retry loops in real app.

evidence.proof: Only token contract schema exists. No live central API pairing, one-time redemption, Stronghold write, or Agent Ring runner binding was executed.
evidence.boundary: Requires live central API endpoint, one-time token redemption, nonce replay protection, secure storage write/read, audit writeback, and Agent Ring runner record binding.

testUnlock.unlockScope: Do not unlock real native proof testing. Test Agent cannot verify Mac/Windows package/install/sign/update/deep-link/notification/secure-storage behavior until toolchains, signing material, updater keys, real frontend build, and Mac/Windows runners exist.
